name: atlas-blob-mesh-determinism
description: Wave 3 Phase 5d — E6 mesh-extraction determinism baseline on the 12-Sphere Blob scene. Same hook as `multi-field-mesh-determinism` but a different scene topology: smooth-union geometry produces a connected closed surface where MC vertex emission is densest, exercising the `(cellsPerEdge+1)³` sample-cache path + welding's hash-grid most heavily. Expected golden values stable across runs; any change to MC tables / welding / normal sampling produces hash divergence → test failure.
